prd.title: VibePilot - Simple Test PRD
prd.overview: Add a simple test feature to verify the endless session spawning is fixed

existing_infrastructure.schema: supabase tables: tasks, task_packets, task_runs, models, platforms, projects, secrets_vault, council_reviews
existing_infrastructure.runners: kimi CLI (with swarm) and API runners (DeepSeek, Gemini, OpenRouter
existing_infrastructure.dependency_rpc: Supabase functions for atomic task unlock

objectives: Complete all agent implementations (Consultant, planner, council, tester)
Connect dashboard to live Supabase data
Enable full task lifecycle: create -> assign -> execute -> review -> test -> merge
Implement Courier agents for web platform delivery
Add voice interface for hands-free operation
success_criteria: User can submit app idea through Consultant
Complete app delivered to user repo
